result: The raw survey datasets have been cleaned and preprocessed. I loaded the seven relevant tab-delimited files, merged them using a full join on the NSID variable, and derived six age-specific NS-SEC variables (nssec17, nssec18, nssec19, nssec20, nssec25, and nssec32). I collapsed fractional NS-SEC codes to their major categories, harmonised missing values to the standard scheme, and implemented the specific requirement for wave 8 where individuals in education were assigned to category 15. The final variables were labelled according to the NS-SEC categories and the result was saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
